---
title: "FEMALE_DE_ANALYSIS"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-23"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
############################################################
## DIFFERENTIAL EXPRESSION ANALYSIS: FEMALE ITS2 DATA
## Comparing WT vs REV, REV vs RRAC, WT vs RRAC
############################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Seurat)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ggrepel)
  library(ggVennDiagram)
  library(gridExtra)
  library(grid)
})

############################################################
## 1. SETUP PATHS AND OUTPUT DIRECTORY
############################################################

# Input paths
male_its2_path <- "~/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/Male/ITS2.csv"

male_paths <- list(
  CONTROL = "/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter/Sanjana/Male_DataSet/data/Control_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5",
  REVERSA = "/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter/Sanjana/Male_DataSet/data/Reversa_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5",
  REVREV  = "/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter/Sanjana/Male_DataSet/data/Reversed_Reversa_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5",
  RRAC226 = "/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter/Sanjana/Male_DataSet/data/RR_AC226_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5"
)


# Output directory
output_dir <- "/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/DE_ANALYSIS/MALE_ITS2_DE_RESULTS"
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

cat("Output directory:", output_dir, "\n\n")

############################################################
## 2. HELPER FUNCTIONS
clean_barcode <- function(bc) {
  bc <- sub("^.*_", "", bc)
  bc <- sub("-\\d+$", "", bc)
  bc
}

clean_slice_id <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(x)
  x <- sub("\\s+ITS$", "", x)
  x
}
##############################################################
cat("Loading MALE 10X data...\n")

male_objs <- lapply(names(male_paths), function(nm) {

  counts <- Read10X_h5(male_paths[[nm]])
  obj <- CreateSeuratObject(counts, project = nm)

  obj$sex <- "Male"
  obj$sample <- nm

  obj$barcode_clean <- clean_barcode(colnames(obj))
  obj$barcode_id <- paste("Male", nm, obj$barcode_clean, sep="_")

  obj
})

male <- merge(
  male_objs[[1]],
  y = male_objs[-1],
  add.cell.ids = names(male_paths),
  project = "Male"
)

male[["RNA"]] <- JoinLayers(male[["RNA"]])

####################################################
cat("Loading Male ITS2 mapping...\n")

male_its <- read.csv(male_its2_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
male_its$slice_id <- clean_slice_id(male_its$ITS2)

male_slice_treatment <- data.frame(
   slice_id = c(
    "314A", "321A", "321B",
    "45-4A", "45-4B",
    "49-1A", "49-1B",
    "45-1A", "45-1B", "45-1C", "45-1D", "45-2A", "45-2B", "45-2C"
  ),
  sample_label = c(
    rep("CONTROL", 3),
    rep("REVERSA", 2),
    rep("REVREV", 2),
    rep("RRAC226", 7)
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

male_slice_treatment$slice_id <- clean_slice_id(male_slice_treatment$slice_id)

male_its$sample_label <- male_slice_treatment$sample_label[
  match(male_its$slice_id, male_slice_treatment$slice_id)
]

male_its <- male_its %>% filter(!is.na(sample_label))

male_its$barcode_clean <- clean_barcode(male_its$Barcode)

male_its$barcode_id <- paste(
  "Male",
  male_its$sample_label,
  male_its$barcode_clean,
  sep = "_"
)

male$slice_id <- male_its$slice_id[
  match(male$barcode_id, male_its$barcode_id)
]

cat("Cells with slice_id:", sum(!is.na(male$slice_id)), "\n")

##################################################################
selected_slices <- male_slice_treatment$slice_id

male_filtered <- subset(male, subset = slice_id %in% selected_slices)

male_filtered$treatment_group <- male_slice_treatment$sample_label[
  match(male_filtered$slice_id, male_slice_treatment$slice_id)
]

table(male_filtered$treatment_group)
#####################################################################
male_filtered <- NormalizeData(male_filtered)
male_filtered <- FindVariableFeatures(male_filtered)
male_filtered <- ScaleData(male_filtered)

Idents(male_filtered) <- "treatment_group"
#####################################################################

de_wt_vs_rev <- FindMarkers(
  male_filtered,
  ident.1 = "REVERSA",
  ident.2 = "CONTROL",
  min.pct = 0.1,
  logfc.threshold = 0.25
)

de_wt_vs_rev$gene <- rownames(de_wt_vs_rev)

de_wt_vs_revrev <- FindMarkers(
  male_filtered,
  ident.1 = "REVREV",
  ident.2 = "CONTROL",
  min.pct = 0.1,
  logfc.threshold = 0.25
)

de_wt_vs_revrev$gene <- rownames(de_wt_vs_revrev)

de_wt_vs_rrac <- FindMarkers(
  male_filtered,
  ident.1 = "RRAC226",
  ident.2 = "CONTROL",
  min.pct = 0.1,
  logfc.threshold = 0.25
)

de_wt_vs_rrac$gene <- rownames(de_wt_vs_rrac)


############################################################
plot_volcano <- function(de, title) {

  padj_cutoff <- 0.05
  fc_cutoff <- 0.5

  de$diffexpressed <- "NO"
  de$diffexpressed[de$avg_log2FC > fc_cutoff & de$p_val_adj < padj_cutoff] <- "UP"
  de$diffexpressed[de$avg_log2FC < -fc_cutoff & de$p_val_adj < padj_cutoff] <- "DOWN"

  de$delabel <- NA

  top_up <- de %>% filter(diffexpressed=="UP") %>%
    arrange(p_val_adj) %>% head(20) %>% pull(gene)

  top_down <- de %>% filter(diffexpressed=="DOWN") %>%
    arrange(p_val_adj) %>% head(20) %>% pull(gene)

  de$delabel[de$gene %in% c(top_up,top_down)] <- de$gene

  ggplot(de, aes(avg_log2FC, -log10(p_val_adj),
                 color=diffexpressed,label=delabel)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.6) +
    geom_text_repel(size=3,max.overlaps=20) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title=title)
}

p1 <- plot_volcano(de_wt_vs_rev,"WT vs REVERSA")
p2 <- plot_volcano(de_wt_vs_revrev,"WT vs REVREV")
p3 <- plot_volcano(de_wt_vs_rrac,"WT vs RRAC226")
##############################################################

up_wt_vs_rev <- de_wt_vs_rev %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC < -0.5 & p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% pull(gene)

up_wt_vs_revrev <- de_wt_vs_revrev %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC < -0.5 & p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% pull(gene)

up_wt_vs_rrac <- de_wt_vs_rrac %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC < -0.5 & p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% pull(gene)

ggVennDiagram(
  list(
    "WT vs REV" = up_wt_vs_rev,
    "WT vs REVREV" = up_wt_vs_revrev,
    "WT vs RRAC226" = up_wt_vs_rrac
  ),
  label="count"
)

down_wt_vs_rev <- de_wt_vs_rev %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > 0.5 & p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% pull(gene)

down_wt_vs_revrev <- de_wt_vs_revrev %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > 0.5 & p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% pull(gene)

down_wt_vs_rrac <- de_wt_vs_rrac %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > 0.5 & p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% pull(gene)

ggVennDiagram(
  list(
    "WT vs REV" = down_wt_vs_rev,
    "WT vs REVREV" = down_wt_vs_revrev,
    "WT vs RRAC226" = down_wt_vs_rrac
  ),
  label="count"
)

```
